focusedDiff: Assert-True ($makefile.Contains('NDS_TASK29_GX_CENSUS ?= 0') -and $makefile.Contains("echo '#define NDS_TASK29_GX_CENSUS `$(NDS_TASK29_GX_CENSUS)';") -and $makefile.Contains('BENCH_MAKE_TASK29_GX_CENSUS=$(NDS_TASK29_GX_CENSUS)')) 'Task 29 GX census is not compile-gated, default-off, or included in benchmark identity.'

Assert-True ($makefile.Contains('NDS_TASK22_WALLPAPER_RUN_LAB ?= 0') -and $makefile.Contains("echo '#define NDS_TASK22_WALLPAPER_RUN_LAB `$(NDS_TASK22_WALLPAPER_RUN_LAB)';") -and $makefile.Contains('BENCH_MAKE_TASK22_WALLPAPER_RUN_LAB=$(NDS_TASK22_WALLPAPER_RUN_LAB)')) 'Task 22 wallpaper run lab is not compile-gated, default-off, or included in benchmark identity.'

Assert-True ($makefile.Contains('NDS_TASK20_STACK_PROFILE ?= 0') -and $makefile.Contains("echo '#define NDS_TASK20_STACK_PROFILE `$(NDS_TASK20_STACK_PROFILE)';") -and $makefile.Contains('BENCH_MAKE_TASK20_STACK_PROFILE=$(NDS_TASK20_STACK_PROFILE)')) 'Task 20 stack profiler is not compile-gated, default-off, or included in benchmark identity.'

-Assert-True ($task20CoroutineArm.Contains('.section .text.ndsCoroutineTask20StackProfile') -and $task20Coroutine -match '(?s)#if NDS_TASK20_STACK_PROFILE\s*extern uintptr_t ndsCoroutineReadSp.*?portCoroutineMainStackTop\(void\).*?#endif' -and $task20Os -match '(?s)#if NDS_TASK20_STACK_PROFILE\s*volatile u32 gNdsTask20GameplayStackBase;.*?volatile u32 gNdsTask20SampleRequest = 1u;.*?if \(\(gNdsTask20SampleRequest == 0u\) && \(finished == FALSE\)\) return;.*?#endif') 'Task 20 stack profiler leaks into normal text/data or scans without its one startup/final request.'

-Assert-True ($harnessScript.Contains('Task20StackProfileMode requires RendererProfileLevel 1.') -and $harnessScript.Contains('separate startup stack census') -and $harnessScript.Contains('at least one benchmark sample for startup census capture') -and $harnessScript.Contains('$task20GameplayCapacity -eq 16384') -and $harnessScript.Contains('$task20SampleCountValid') -and $harnessScript.Contains("'startup-only'") -and $harnessScript.Contains('task20StackProfileMode =') -and $harnessScript.Contains('task20Stack = $task20StackEvidence') -and $harnessScript.Contains('task20Stack = @($task20StackRows)') -and $harnessScript.Contains('$task20MarginNeed')) 'Task 20 verifier no longer identifies startup-only sampling or exports exact capacity, watermark, guards, and fit classification.'

+Assert-True ($task20CoroutineArm.Contains('.section .text.ndsCoroutineTask20StackProfile') -and $task20Coroutine -match '(?s)#if NDS_TASK20_STACK_PROFILE\s*extern u8 __dtcm_bss_end.*?gNdsTask20CoroutineCensus\[NDS_TASK20_COROUTINE_CENSUS_CAPACITY\].*?portCoroutineTask20Register.*?portCoroutineTask20Retire.*?portCoroutineMainStackTop\(void\).*?#endif' -and $task20Os -match '(?s)#if NDS_TASK20_STACK_PROFILE\s*volatile u32 gNdsTask20GameplayStackBase;.*?volatile u32 gNdsTask20SampleRequest = 1u;.*?portCoroutineTask20Sample\(thread->port_coroutine\);.*?if \(\(gNdsTask20SampleRequest == 0u\) && \(finished == FALSE\)\) return;.*?#endif') 'Task 20/31 stack profiler lost its profile-only lifetime census or request-gated watermark scan.'

+Assert-True ($harnessScript.Contains('Task20StackProfileMode requires RendererProfileLevel 1.') -and $harnessScript.Contains('separate startup stack census') -and $harnessScript.Contains('at least one benchmark sample for startup census capture') -and $harnessScript.Contains('$task20GameplayCapacity -eq 16384') -and $harnessScript.Contains('$task20SampleCountValid') -and $harnessScript.Contains("'startup-only'") -and $harnessScript.Contains('TASK31_CENSUS_SUMMARY=') -and $harnessScript.Contains('TASK31_CENSUS=') -and $harnessScript.Contains('$task20CensusSummary[5]') -and $harnessScript.Contains('task20CoroutineCensus = @($task20CensusRows)') -and $harnessScript.Contains('task20StackProfileMode =') -and $harnessScript.Contains('task20Stack = $task20StackEvidence') -and $harnessScript.Contains('task20Stack = @($task20StackRows)') -and $harnessScript.Contains('$task20MarginNeed')) 'Task 20/31 verifier no longer exports capacity, lifetime census, watermark, guards, or fit classification.'

Assert-True ($task20LayoutChecker.Contains("Unexpected application DTCM object") -and $task20LayoutChecker.Contains('forbiddenDmaRefs=0(applicationOwners=0)') -and $harnessScript.Contains("check-task20-dtcm-layout.ps1")) 'Task 20 post-link owner, stack-boundary, or forbidden-DMA layout gate is missing.'

Assert-True ($makefile.Contains('NDS_RENDERER_SCREEN_SPACE_CENSUS ?= 0') -and $makefile.Contains('NDS_RENDER_ECONOMY ?= 0') -and $makefile.Contains('NDS_RENDER_ECONOMY_OWNER_MASK ?= 32') -and $makefile.Contains('BENCH_MAKE_SCREEN_SPACE_CENSUS=$(NDS_RENDERER_SCREEN_SPACE_CENSUS)') -and $makefile.Contains('BENCH_MAKE_RENDER_ECONOMY_OWNER_MASK=$(NDS_RENDER_ECONOMY_OWNER_MASK)')) 'Task 11 census/economy flags are not default-safe, retained on owner 5, or included in benchmark identity.'

'printf "TASK20_STACK=%u,%u,%u,%u,%u,%u,%u,%u\n", gNdsTask20GameplayStackBase, gNdsTask20GameplayStackSize, gNdsTask20GameplayStackHighWater, gNdsTask20MainStackBottom, gNdsTask20MainStackPoisonStart, gNdsTask20MainStackTop, gNdsTask20MainStackHighWater, gNdsTask20SampleCount'

$lifecycleCommands += 'printf "TASK20_STACK=%u,%u,%u,%u,%u,%u,%u,%u\n", gNdsTask20GameplayStackBase, gNdsTask20GameplayStackSize, gNdsTask20GameplayStackHighWater, gNdsTask20MainStackBottom, gNdsTask20MainStackPoisonStart, gNdsTask20MainStackTop, gNdsTask20MainStackHighWater, gNdsTask20SampleCount'

+            'Task 31 coroutine census was empty, overflowed, or omitted rows.' `

+            "Task20 startup/final stack: records=$($task20StackRecords.Count) samples=$($task20StackLast[7]) gameplay=id$task20GameplayOwnerId/$($task20StackLast[0])/$task20GameplayCapacity/hwm$task20GameplayHighWater mainPostInit=$($task20StackLast[3])..$($task20StackLast[4])..$($task20StackLast[5])/hwm$task20MainHighWater dtcmGap=$task20DtcmGap fit=$task20RawFit/rawNeed$task20RawNeed/delta$($task20DtcmGap-$task20RawNeed) marginNeed$task20MarginNeed/delta$($task20DtcmGap-$task20MarginNeed) guards=64 census=$task20CensusCount/live$($task20CensusSummary[2])/peak$($task20CensusSummary[3])/large$($task20CensusSummary[4])/largePeak$($task20CensusSummary[5])/overflow$($task20CensusSummary[1])"
@@ -27,11 +27,16 @@ static void ndsOsTask20SampleStack(const OSThread *thread, s32 finished)
